short_description: Generates predictions using the best-performing models from an automated regression leaderboard.
long_description: This function utilizes a model from the AutoRegressor leaderboard to create predictions on a response variable for a test dataset, allowing for rank selection and model loading preferences.

input_tables.name: InputTable
input_tables.description: Specifies the table containing the input test data.

input_tables.name: ModelTable
input_tables.description: Specifies the table containing the model/leaderboard data.

argument_clauses.name: Rank
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the rank of the model in the leaderboard to be used for prediction. Default value is 1.

argument_clauses.name: UseLoadedModels
argument_clauses.description: Specifies whether to use loaded models from database for prediction or not. Default value is False.

argument_clauses.name: PreserveColumns
argument_clauses.description: Specifies whether to preserve input data transformed columns in the output prediction. Default value: False.
